code:
--- title: BaRS Vaccination Appointment Booking Sequence description: Sequence diagram showing the process of booking a vaccination appointment using the BaRS system. author: Matthew Brown date: 2025-08-01 tags: [CloudNative_Serverless] displayMode: sequence config: theme: default look: handdrawn --- sequenceDiagram actor ICB actor P as Patient participant NHSA as NHS App participant BP as BaRS Proxy participant MYA as Manage Your Appt participant NRL as National Record Locator participant NHSN as NHS Notify participant T as Tasking Service (CloudNative_K8sCluster) note over ICB: ICB has a list of patients
who need to be vaccinated ICB->>+BP: Request vaccine using BaRS ServiceRequest %% see https://simplifier.net/nhsbookingandreferrals/~resources?category=Example&exampletype=Bundle&sortBy=DisplayName for example messages BP->>MYA: Request vaccine using BaRS ServiceRequest MYA-->>BP: Acknowledge request BP-->>-ICB: Acknowledge request MYA->>T: Create Task for Patient to Book Appointment T-->>MYA: Return Task id MYA->>+NHSN: Inform patient of referral and need to book appt NHSN->>-NHSA: Notify patient NHSA->>P: Notify patient P->>P: Reads notification P->>NHSA: Launches NHS App activate NHSA NHSA<<->>T: Reads and shows patient outstanding tasks P->>NHSA: Clicks "Book Vaccine Appt" generated from Task NHSA->>+BP: Uses Task metadata to query Slots for HealthcareService BP->>MYA: Query Slots MYA-->>BP: Return Slots BP-->>-NHSA: Return Slots P->>NHSA: Choose Appointment Slot NHSA->>+BP: Create Appt w/ Slot Details BP->>MYA: Create Appt w/ Slot Details MYA-->>MYA: Check ServiceRequest for patient eligibility MYA--)T: Mark Task as Complete MYA-->>BP: Confirm Appt Booked Note over MYA: Details on how
Appointment is matched
to ServiceRequest to be defined BP-->>-NHSA: Confirm Appt Booked NHSA-->>P: Show Appointment Confirmation opt MYA->>NHSN: Confirm Appointment Booked via message end deactivate NHSA Note over MYA: Inform NRL of Appointment
in background MYA->>+BP: Create Appt Pointer with Datetime and Status BP->>-NRL: Create Appt Pointer with Datetime and Status
repo_description: repository for hosting random TA PoCs

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个BaRS疫苗预约的完整时序图。场景是：ICB有一批需要接种疫苗的患者名单，通过BaRS Proxy发起预约请求，最终患者能在NHS App上完成预约。关键参与者包括NHS Notify通知患者，还有Tasking Service来管理任务状态。
明白了。我注意到Tasking Service标注为CloudNative_K8sCluster，这是强调它的部署特性吗？另外，ICB和Patient作为actor，和其他participant的样式需要区分开对吧？
对，Tasking Service是云原生的K8s集群，标注一下。ICB和Patient确实是外部角色，用actor表示。流程上先加一条注释说明ICB有患者名单，然后ICB向BaRS Proxy发送ServiceRequest。
好的，我先画出初始结构：ICB和Patient作为actor，然后NHS App、BaRS Proxy、Manage Your Appt、National Record Locator、NHS Notify、Tasking Service作为participant。加上ICB的注释，并画出ICB到BaRS Proxy的请求线，以及Proxy转发到Manage Your Appt的消息。
接下来Manage Your Appt需要创建任务。这里有个细节：它要调用Tasking Service创建任务，拿到Task id后再通知NHS Notify，NHS Notify再层层通知到患者。患者打开NHS App后，App要从Tasking Service读取待办任务。
这里我画一下：MYA创建Task，T返回Task id，然后MYA通知NHSN，NHSN通知NHSA，NHSA通知Patient。患者读取通知后启动App，App激活后从T读取任务。不过NHS App和Tasking Service的交互是实线还是虚线？
NHS App从Tasking Service读取任务用虚线箭头，表示返回数据。然后患者点击"预约疫苗"按钮，App用Task的元数据去BaRS Proxy查询可用时段。Proxy再转给Manage Your Appt查Slots。
已添加：患者点击预约后，NHSA向BP查询Slots，BP转MYA，返回Slots列表给患者选择。患者选好后，NHSA向BP创建预约，BP转MYA。这里MYA需要自检患者资格，然后标记Task完成，并回传确认。
对，但MYA标记Task完成用异步消息，画个开口箭头。另外需要加注释说明Appointment如何匹配ServiceRequest还没定。最后MYA要异步通知NRL，通过BaRS Proxy创建预约指针，包含时间和状态。
等等，我检查一下——MYA到T的完成标记应该是异步的，我画成实线了。还有NRL的通知，应该是MYA后台异步处理，不是和前面同步的。我修正一下：MYA-)T用异步箭头，然后加opt块表示MYA可选地通知NHSN确认预约，最后MYA-+BP创建指针，BP--NRL。
修正得对。确认一下整体流程：ICB发起→Proxy转发→MYA处理→创建Task→通知患者→患者App查任务→选时段→创建预约→标记完成→可选通知→后台同步NRL。NHS App在流程结束时要deactivate。
完成。已添加所有激活和停用标记，NHS App在确认预约后deactivate。opt块包含MYA到NHSN的确认消息，最后MYA后台通知NRL的注释和消息流也画好了。整个BaRS疫苗预约流程的时序图应该完整了。
